overview.name: WebSocket Standard Text Variables
overview.description:
This scenario verifies standard WebSocket text execution using variables.
Test flow includes: 1. Create variables for outgoing messages and expected file names. 2. Connect to standard WebSocket. 3. Send first text message using variable. 4. Receive echoed response. 5. Send second text message using variable. 6. Receive echoed response.
This scenario validates: - Variable injection into websocket text messages - Variable reuse across send steps - Stable text send/receive flow - Correct echoed responses

var.comment: Create variable for first text message
var.name: firstMessage

websocket.comment: Step 1-6. Execute standard websocket text flow using variables

send.comment: Step 3. Send first text message using variable
